Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 — Search Emeka's sent emails about the Mosaic damage claim
Use search_emails (query: "Mosaic" or "damage claim" or "prototype" or "Zara Okoye"). Find the incident report email sent to Tamara Byrd (ID: 9e09a6dc96e24c1ba2d14ab1f1b4dfc7) and the financial update email sent to Marcus Thorne (ID: b74282e74b844b549f32d0319d881d80). Identify the errors: wrong destination (Cherokee County instead of Atlanta), wrong insurance figure sent to Marcus ($80K instead of $50K).
OE 2 — Search Slack for Emeka's messages about the damage claim
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "Mosaic" or "damage claim" or "prototype"). Find the #operations message where Emeka posted wrong figures — $200K prototype value, $80K insurance coverage, and Cherokee County destination — with a direct @mention of Marcus Thorne.
OE 3 — Find Chloe's hold recommendation in Slack
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "incident report" or "May 1" or "insurance"). Find Chloe Vance's message (timestamp: 1774628308.836787) recommending the formal incident report to Tamara be held until May 1st pending the insurance company's formal response.
OE 4 — Search Airtable for Zara Okoye's relocation record
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "Zara Okoye" or "Mosaic"). Find the relocation record confirming the correct destination is Atlanta, GA — not Cherokee County, GA.
OE 5 — Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics account and deals
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Mosaic Robotics") and crm_search_deals (query: "Mosaic"). Confirm the $90K damage claim figures and $50K insurance coverage as the authoritative numbers.
OE 6 — Search CRM for Mosaic engagements
Use crm_list_engagements filtered by Mosaic company ID. Find logged interactions to confirm financial details.
OE 7 — Look up Marcus Thorne's and Tamara Byrd's contacts
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne") to get marcus.thorne@moveops.com. Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Tamara Byrd") to get tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com.
OE 8 — Send correction to Marcus Thorne
Use send_email (to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com) or conversations_add_message (Slack). Correct the destination from Cherokee County to Atlanta, GA; correct the insurance coverage from $80K to $50K; confirm the gap remains $40K.
OE 9 — Post correction in #operations Slack channel
Use conversations_add_message to post a correction in #operations (C006). Correct: prototype value ($90K not $200K), insurance coverage ($50K not $80K), and destination (Atlanta not Cherokee County).
OE 10 — Send correction email to Tamara Byrd
Use send_email (to: tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com). Correct the destination from Cherokee County to Atlanta, GA.
OE 11 — Update CRM notes on Mosaic account with corrected figures
Use crm_create_engagement (company_id: Mosaic company ID). Log the accurate financial details ($90K prototype, $50K insurance, $40K gap) so the CRM reflects correct numbers.
OE 12 — Search CRM for Sunbelt VP account and deal
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Sunbelt") or crm_search_deals (query: "Sunbelt"). Find the account record and check deal stage.
OE 13 — Search CRM for Palmetto Foundation account and deal
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Palmetto") or crm_search_deals (query: "Palmetto"). Find the account record and check deal stage.
OE 14 — Search CRM for Axiom Precision account and deal
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Axiom") or crm_search_deals (query: "Axiom"). Expected finding: Axiom may have incomplete CRM setup despite the intake being completed.
OE 15 — Search Airtable for Sunbelt, Palmetto, and Axiom client account records
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblClientAccts01, query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "Axiom"). Expected finding: Axiom's record (recAcct000000013) still shows "Cold Outreach" status with 0 relocations despite the intake being complete.
OE 16 — Search Airtable for relocation records
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "Axiom"). Check whether relocation records exist. Sunbelt and Palmetto should have completed relocations. Axiom has no relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick despite the intake being done.
OE 17 — Search emails for onboarding communications
Use search_emails (query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "Axiom" or "onboarding"). Find whether welcome emails were sent and any coordination threads.
OE 18 — Fix Axiom Airtable record status
Use airtable_update_records (base: appMoveOpsOps001, table: tblClientAccts01, record: recAcct000000013). Update Axiom's status from "Cold Outreach" to "Active" or "Onboarding" and update Total Relocations from 0 to 1.
OE 19 — Search Linear for existing tracking tickets
Use linear_list_issues (query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "Axiom"). Check whether onboarding tickets exist.
OE 20 — Create Linear tracking ticket for outstanding items
Use linear_create_issue (team: team_operations or team_relocations, title: referencing new account follow-up or onboarding gaps). The prompt says "create a tracking ticket for anything that still needs follow-up."
OE 21 — Schedule check-in calendar event for next week
Use calendar_add_calendar_event (title: referencing account review or check-in, start_datetime: during week of April 27–May 1 2026, attendees: emeka.diallo@moveops.com).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 18 — Fix Axiom Airtable record status
